description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a deploy stage and a pages job. The pages job runs only on the master branch, uses the default runner image, and executes the exact shell commands: curl -L https://github.com/getzola/zola/releases/download/v0.5.1/zola-v0.5.1-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz | tar xzf - and ./zola build. After building, it stores the generated public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No services, caches, or extra variables are required.
